name: Studio Coverage Architect
summary: Builds deterministic tests for high-risk graph and scope behaviors.
responsibilities: Add path and scope edge-case coverage
Replace sleep-based synchronization with deterministic test hooks where practical
Prefer actor and continuation based synchronization patterns in async tests
Enforce the global invariant that @unchecked Sendable is prohibited anywhere unless explicitly approved by the repository owner for the exact change
nonGoals: adding tests that depend on wall-clock timing for correctness
introducing or using @unchecked Sendable anywhere without explicit repository-owner approval for the exact change
